message:
fix(wasm): add error handling for HTTP poll init, WebSocket wait, and WASM bootstrap

Wrap three async calls in try-catch to prevent unhandled promise
rejections from crashing the dashboard:

- beginHttpPolling: catch errors from the initial pollHttpStateOnce()
  call so the fallback poller does not abort on a transient network
  failure during startup.

- waitForWebSocketConnection: catch errors from sleep() to handle edge
  cases where the timer promise rejects (e.g., page unload during the
  wait loop).

- main: catch errors from initWasm() so the page degrades gracefully
  if WASM module loading fails instead of leaving the UI blank.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
